query:
INSERT INTO backup_keys (
                backup_id, room_id, session_id, session_data, created_ts,
                first_message_index, forwarded_count, is_verified
            )
            SELECT kb.backup_id, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9
            FROM key_backups kb
            WHERE kb.user_id = $1
              AND (kb.backup_id_text = $2 OR kb.version::text = $2)
